notes:
- Stream Deck+: new Dial action — rotate to scroll profiles, push to apply
- Stream Deck: WallShift category label and icon in the actions list
- Stream Deck: fixed Smart Surprise and Surprise All not applying after preview
- Stream Deck: fixed Property Inspector dark theme styling
- Online search: fixed orientation and resolution filters not applying correctly
- Online search: added save-to-disk — hover a result and click the download icon
- Online search: fixed Unsplash downloading preview size instead of full resolution
- Online search: more results per page (Unsplash 20→30, Pexels 20→40)
- Settings: Clear Cache now also clears the online downloads folder
- Large wallpapers: adaptive settle time prevents apply failures on 40MB+ files
